scale_note: Test scale targets 100 customers / 100 media assets. Production goals (full-scale 80M ad-tier subscribers, $50B revenue, 48 live events) are preserved as goals_full_scale_reference for promotion path.
mandates: M1: Maintain platform uptime ≥ 99.97% monthly. M2: Zero tolerance for data breaches involving PII. M3: Full regulatory compliance in every operating jurisdiction. M4: All content properly rights-cleared before publication. M5: Financial reporting accuracy — zero material misstatements. M6: No unauthorized use of customer data. Encoded as hard constraints in the CORE Graph; agents cannot trade them off.
mandate_enforcement: M1: Operational Twin monitors uptime; degradation below 99.97% triggers incident response + CISO escalation. M2: Security agents block any data egress not matching approved patterns; violation triggers Legal + CISO. M3: Legal & Compliance Governor monitors continuously; novel situations escalate to Legal Director. M4: Rights subgraph consulted before any publication; uncertainty triggers rights hold + escalation. M5: Financial agents reconcile continuously; discrepancies >$10 (test scale) flag for CFO. M6: Data Governance Agent enforces access; anomalous access triggers security exception.
goals_test_scale: G1: Grow customer base toward 120 (from 100). Owner: Market & Ecosystem Governor. G2: Achieve $50,000 simulated revenue. Owner: Financial Governor. G3: Launch 1 live-equivalent test event. Owner: Operations & Delivery Governor. G4: Hold operating margin ≥ 20% (test envelope). Owner: Financial Governor. G5: Reduce simulated content-delivery cost per stream-hour by 10%. Owner: Financial + Operations Governors.
goal_priorities: G4 (margin) > G2 (revenue) > G1 (customer growth) > G3 (events) > G5 (cost). If G1 spend threatens G4, Exception Economy routes to CFO. If G3 costs overshoot, defer events rather than exceed budget. Priority orderings quarterly-configurable by CEO + CFO.
planning_cadence: Annual goals set by board (CEO proxy in test mode). Quarterly refinement: weeks 11-12 of prior quarter. Operations & Delivery Governor ingests updated doctrine and cascades to all Domain Governors within minutes. Work-group agents receive updated execution parameters through the Orchestration Plane.
objectives_aspirational: O1: Most-loved entertainment brand in simulated markets (NPS > 50). O2: Definitive non-English storytelling platform at test scale. O3: Pioneer AI-personalized interactive storytelling patterns. O4: Industry leader in creator-friendly practices. O5: Net-zero carbon operations by 2030.
deprioritization_signals: O1: Quarterly NPS + sentiment. Deprioritize if NPS improvement requires >$5,000 test-annual investment with no revenue correlation. O2: Non-English viewing hours / total. O3: Interactive launches + engagement. Deprioritize O3 if <5% engagement after 3 quarters.
goals_full_scale_reference: G1f: Grow ad-tier subscribers to 80M globally. G2f: $50B total revenue. G3f: 48 NetStreamX Live events. G4f: 28% operating margin. G5f: 12% reduction in content delivery cost per stream-hour. Production cutover restores these in place of test-scale goals.
